SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.util

Class IOUtil

java.lang.Object
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.util.IOUtil
public class IOUtil extends Object
IOUtil provides methods and constants for Input and Output interactions with Files, Consoles, etc.

This class is final and has no instance variables, and is not designed to be instantiated.

    • closeQuietly

      public static void closeQuietly(Closeable c)

    • listFiles

      public static Set<Path> listFiles(Path dir) throws IOException
      Returns a Set of Paths for all the files in the specified directory.

      Equivalent to

      invalid reference 
      listFiles(dir,
 FileExtension.ALL)
      Parameters:
      dir - The path to the directory to list the files within
      Returns:
      A Set of Paths to each file within the directory
      Throws:
      IOException - If the directory path is invalid or unable to be located
      See Also:
      • FileOperations.FileExtension.ALL

    • listFiles

      public static Set<Path> listFiles(Path dir, IOUtil.Extension extension) throws IOException
      Returns a Set of Paths for all the files in the specificed directory with the given extension.
      Parameters:
      dir - The path to the directory to list the files within.
      extension - A FileOperations.FileExtension to filter the Path results by.
      Returns:
      A Set of Paths to each file within the directory with the extension.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the directory path is invalid or unable to be located.

    • emptyFiles

      public static void emptyFiles(Path dir, IOUtil.Extension extension) throws IOException
      Empties a directory of all files with the given extension. Searches only the directory itself, not any subdirectories (non-recursive).
      Parameters:
      dir - The directory to empty.
      extension - The extension to target.
      Throws:
      IOException - When the directory is invalid or inaccessable.

    • readFile

      public static List<String> readFile(Path path)
      Reads a file and returns its content lines as a List of Strings.
      Parameters:
      path - Path to the file to read.
      Returns:
      A List of Strings containing the lines in the file.

    • writeFile

      public static void writeFile(String filename, IOUtil.Extension extension, Path destination, String content)
      Writes a String line to a file with the given directory, name, and extension.
      Parameters:
      filename - String name of the file to create / write to. Should not contain the extension of the file.
      extension - Extension of the file.
      destination - Path to the Directory which will contain the created / written file.
      content - String to write into the file.
      See Also:
      • writeFile(String, Extension, Path, List)

    • writeFile

      public static void writeFile(String filename, IOUtil.Extension extension, Path destination, List<String> content)
      Writes String lines to a file with the given directory, name, and extension.
      Parameters:
      filename - String name of the file to create / write to. Should not contain the extension of the file.
      extension - Extension of the file.
      destination - Path to the Directory which will contain the created / written file.
      content - List of Strings to write into the file. Each String will be put on a new line.
      See Also:
      • writeFile(File, List)

    • writeFile

      public static void writeFile(File file, List<String> content)
      Writes String lines to a file.
      Parameters:
      file - Valid File to be written into.
      content - List of Strings to write into the file. Each String will be put on a new line.

    • readAllLines

      public static List<String> readAllLines(File file) throws FileNotFoundException
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException
